title: basella oleracea var. alba
intro: Basella oleracea var. alba, also known as white Indian spinach, is a variety of the Basella oleracea plant, a type of leafy green vegetable native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. The health benefits of Basella oleracea var. alba include its ability to boost the immune system, lower blood pressure, and improve eye health, making it a valuable addition to a healthy diet. Basella oleracea var. alba can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or cooked as a vegetable, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
